reasoning_model_1: The model fails to strictly adhere to the provided text script, adding '呜呜呜' (crying sounds) at the beginning (00:00-00:01) and the particle '啊' at the end (00:04). model_comparison: Model 2 (T2) is the clear winner. T2 strictly adheres to the requested content, whereas Model 1 (T1) hallucinates additional sounds ('呜呜呜') and words ('啊').
